name: pr-source contract operator-facing validator accepts an entry with all required section 2.12 fields
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - id: cfpb
    name: cfpb
    github: cfpb/consumerfinance
    tier: 1
    source_class: federal-financial-regulator
    applies_to: [react, node]
    fetch_frequency: daily
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --tier operator 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'sources_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
